name: Peanut Butter Jewels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine cookie mix, peanut butter flavor packet from Mix and egg in a large bowl. Stir until thoroughly blended. Shape dough into 36 (1-inch) balls.
3. Roll half the balls in sugar and half in chopped peanuts. Place 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Make indentation in center of each ball with finger or handle end of wooden spoon.
4. Dollop 1/4 teaspoon strawberry jam into each indentation.
5. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool 1 minute on baking sheets. Remove to cooling racks. Cool completely.
6. Store in an airtight container.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
Tip: For a delicious flavor variation, try seedless red raspberry or blackberry jam.
